name: turkish-real-estate-scraper
title: Turkish Real Estate Portal Scraper (CB, C21, ERA, RealtyWorld, Remax, Turyap)
description: Scrapes all property listings from 6 major Turkish real estate portals: CB.com.tr, Century21.com.tr, ERA.com.tr, RealtyWorld.com.tr, Remax.com.tr and Turyap.com.tr. Supports resume via checkpoints. Outputs normalized JSON with price, location, coordinates and full property details.
notice: This actor requires a paid subscription. See pricing below.
